name: Matt Ox
description: '''Matthew Christopher Grau''' (born December 13, 2004), known professionally as '''Matt Ox''', is an American rapper and singer from Philadelphia. He is best known for his 2017 single "Overwhelming", as well as his guest appearance on [[XXXTentacion]]'s 2018 track "$$$", which received [[RIAA certification|platinum]] certification by the [[Recording Industry Association of America]] (RIAA) and appeared the latter's album ''[[? (XXXTentacion album)|?]]'' (2018).
